item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
leaving behind only the organs, monetarily valuable on person belongings, and — on several occasions — teeth that have been filled with precious metals.

This reads strange to me. It might need fixing, or it might just be my parsing issues acting up. However, that aside, the fact that these are the things left behind seems to play against the fact that organs, monetary valuables, and teeth are the very things being sold by Mr. Hat.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Imagining Mr Hat as Reddington made me upvote.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Gotcha.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: "Thing what kills you."

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Oh man, that's a great headcanon I love it! I picture him as something more of a Raymond Reddington lookin' motherfucker, but I really like your interpretation.

On an unrelated note, what does TWKY mean?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This was nice. It felt just a little bit cut off, like there was more that was meant to be there, but that's just my opinion. Besides, for a first SCP, this is really good.

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This started out promising. Then I read the logs and the promise was fulfilled. My headcanon has Mr. Hat as a thinner, less flamboyant Babadook. I have no idea what happens inside the house, and it works great that way.

I admit I'm not partial to TWKY SCPs, but this is an exception. It doesn't kill to kill, it kills with a rational economic goal - and that's something that happens in the NotFoundationverse.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: 'Expunged people to death' honestly got me to laugh harder than it should have. Thanks for the upvote!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
It's been a while since I saw something that expunged people to death. Got a real nostalgia rush off that, and given that it's the only instance, I'm totally okay with it being here.

an unknown liquid metal with consistency similar to tar

I'd buy that for a quarter!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I like the premise and the interviews here (enough to definitely +1 this), but the censorship is getting on my nerves. Why can't I know how many people have entered the house, or how many foundation personnel have died? It feels unnecessarily restrictive.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Thank you so much!
You know, if there's one philosophy that hat wearing phantasms believe in, it's obviously the power of the American dollar.

item.title: (no title)
item.wikidot:authorName: J E S T E R
item.content:encoded: Congrats on a successful first! Great dialogue, nice premise. Never thought I'd read about a capitalist, organ-harvesting ghost - good job all around, and I can't wait to see what comes next!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Thank you!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: You left a "[optional time info]" in one of the interview logs. I'm pretty sure this was a mistake, so I removed it. Just FYI.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I had originally considered including what SCP-3563-2 does when it enters the house, but opted to instead redact the data in favor of including the ' Subject was covered in human cerebrospinal fluid' line. I felt that this gave the reader the idea that something bad was definitely happening once the child enters the house, but I wanted the reader to go fucking wild with their imagination.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I liked this, but I felt that the usage of [DATA EXPUNGED] was clusmy and bad - enough to prevent an upvote. Other than that, I thought this was well done.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Aye! You're right, when I first posted it to the sandbox it had initially been keter, but I changed it back after having removed a rather troublesome incident report I wasn't too happy with. Changing back to keter, thank you!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Very good read. It's nice to see a malevolent SCP with an actual goal beyond existing to be spooky. I feel like this should be Keter though, due to it being un-containable?

item.title: Re: Whoop whoop! First skip
item.content:encoded: Up-voted my dude lol

item.title: Whoop whoop! First skip
item.content:encoded: Hey! Huge thanks to everyone who helped me make this on the forums, and on the Site-19 chat room. Here's to my first of hopefully many more skips to come!
